The plant Balinotella seseloides, also known as "Balinotella," is a flowering plant that belongs to the family Asteraceae. It has been traditionally used in folk medicine to treat various health issues, including inflammation and digestive problems, due to its purported health benefits of reducing oxidative stress and promoting gut health. Bioactive constituents of Balinotella seseloides include sesquiterpene lactones, flavonoids, and phenolic acids, which are responsible for its medicinal properties. The most common herbal preparations made with Balinotella seseloides include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are used to treat a range of health conditions.
